text:
On Thu, Aug 19, 1999 at 02:36:58PM +0200, Sheldon Hearn wrote:
> 
> Could you take a look at the port as it stands, with rev 1.7 of the
> Makefile, and see what needs to be done after Chris's changes?

Working on it right now.  I'm just in the process of fetching all
the distfiles for gcc-2.95.1 over my poor overworked ISDN line.

I should have a "yay! it works!" or "no! it doesn't" report by the
end of today.

-aDe

Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
